personalInfo.name: Rania Abdelbary Abdelstar
personalInfo.title: Architectural Engineer | BIM Specialist
personalInfo.description: BIM-focused Architectural Engineer with 8+ years of experience in architectural design, site supervision, and finishing works management.
personalInfo.about: Architectural Engineer with 8+ years of experience across governmental and commercial projects. Specialized in BIM-driven workflows using Revit for coordinated model development, technical documentation, and multidisciplinary integration. Experienced in ISO 19650 information management, 4D/5D BIM processes, and delivering technically compliant solutions in fast-paced environments.

services.title: BIM Modeling & Coordination
services.description: Developing federated BIM models using Revit and coordinating multidisciplinary clashes using Navisworks with full ISO 19650 compliance.

services.title: Architectural Design & Detailing
services.description: Delivering detailed architectural drawings and technical documentation for governmental and commercial projects.

services.title: Site Supervision & Finishing Works
services.description: Managing interior and exterior finishing works, coordinating contractors, consultants, and ensuring quality compliance on-site.

services.title: 4D/5D BIM & Cost Integration
services.description: Implementing construction sequencing simulations and integrating BIM models with schedules and cost estimation (BOQ/MBOQ).

experience.title: Architect
experience.company: Engineering Authority of the Armed Forces
experience.description: Supervised interior and exterior finishing works for large-scale projects. Coordinated between contractors, consultants, and stakeholders. Monitored site progress and maintained compliance with technical specifications. Developed architectural BIM models using Revit and participated in coordination workflows to minimize clashes and rework.
projects: Nano Building, Faculty of Science – Ain Shams University (with IBS)
Cosmic Village School – 6th of October City (with Mobica)
MAMINA'S Restaurant – Palm Hills Compound, 6th of October, Cairo

experience.title: Architect
experience.description: Assisted in architectural design development and 3D visualization. Produced detailed drawings and presentation materials. Supported coordination between design and execution teams.

experience.title: Architectural Intern
experience.description: Gained practical experience in architectural site training.

experience.title: Site Training Intern
experience.description: Gained hands-on experience in site execution and structural works. Assisted engineers in monitoring site activities and reviewing drawings.

projects.title: Nano Building – Faculty of Science, Ain Shams University
projects.description: Large-scale academic building developed in collaboration with IBS. Contributed to BIM model development, site coordination, and finishing works supervision.

projects.title: Magic Land Project
projects.description: Commercial project executed with Kayan Company. Involved coordination with contractors and stakeholders, site supervision, and BIM-based documentation.

projects.title: Cosmic Village School
projects.description: Educational facility in 6th of October City, developed with Mobica. Managed finishing works and coordinated multidisciplinary teams on-site.

projects.title: MAMINA'S Restaurant – Palm Hills Compound
projects.description: Commercial F&B interior architecture project in 6th of October, Cairo. Contributed to design detailing and finishing works management.

projects.title: KAITECH School – Graduation Project
projects.description: Kaitech School Project New Administrative Capital, Egypt, with a total area of approximately 28,600 m²The project was developed using BIM methodologies and ISO 19650

projects.title: Residential Villa | BIM Architectural Project
projects.description: Created a fully coordinated BIM model in Autodesk Revit, delivering parametric architectural modeling, construction documentation, schedules, and high-quality visual presentations in accordance with industry BIM standards.

education.university: Modern Academy for Engineering and Technology

expertiseDetails.title: BIM Modeling & Documentation
expertiseDetails.desc: Advanced Revit modeling, LOD 100–400 development, BEP preparation and implementation.

expertiseDetails.title: Clash Detection & Coordination
expertiseDetails.desc: Federated model coordination using Navisworks, categorizing Hard/Soft/Workflow clashes, issuing coordination reports.

expertiseDetails.title: 4D/5D BIM Integration
expertiseDetails.desc: Construction sequencing simulations and cost integration with model-based BOQ (MBOQ) and quantity take-off.

expertiseDetails.title: ISO 19650 Compliance
expertiseDetails.desc: Structured project information, naming conventions, version control, and document approval workflows per BIM standards.

expertiseDetails.title: Site Supervision
expertiseDetails.desc: Managing finishing works, resolving on-site technical issues, and maintaining quality standards.

expertiseDetails.title: 3D Visualization
expertiseDetails.desc: High-quality architectural renders and presentation materials using 3Ds Max and Corona.
